v2.4.0 Engine Release

The Framework for High-Performance Rendering

Pixora is a system-driven engine architected for precision and speed. Build modern web interfaces with a developer-first mental model and engine-level transparency.

Get Started arrow_forward View Documentation

Architecture

Engineered for Clarity

dynamic_form

Unified Pipeline

A single source of truth for your rendering logic. No more synchronization issues between state and view layers.

security

Type-Safe Props

Deep integration with TypeScript for error-free development. Compile-time checks for all your rendering parameters.

account_tree

Node-Based Inspector

Visualize your component tree with engine-level precision. Debug layout shifts and paint cycles in real-time.

0.4ms Latency
120fps Refresh Rate
2.4kb Runtime Size
99% Type Coverage

Ready to architect the future?

Join the next generation of developers building high-performance web experiences with Pixora.
